license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bas5ieg6
title: Vegan  Latkes
author: Lenny Teytelman

steps_raw.instruction: Add \frac{1}{4} cup of flour to the potatoes
Cut up the potatoes and grate in a food processor.
Cover bottom of a frying pan with oil and heat to medium-high.
Use a spoon to remove the water; keep doing this as you fry. Put the spoon onto the surface of the batter, pressing it down a little bit. Let the liquid seep in.
Flip, add more oil, and fry another 3-5 minutes. 00:03:00
Process quickly again to mix the salt and flour.
